Who We Are

About Magnoryx

At Magnoryx, we redefine reliability. Built on a foundation of uncompromising strength and industrial resilience, we provide the heavy-duty gear and machinery essential for demanding environments. From the depths of the mining sector to the frontlines of heavy construction, our products are engineered to endure the toughest conditions on earth.

We believe that industrial equipment shouldn't just meet standards — it should set them. Our design philosophy fuses raw durability with precision engineering, ensuring your operations never miss a beat.

Design Philosophy

  • Raw durability engineered for extreme environments
  • Precision engineering across every product line
  • Zero-compromise operational reliability
  • Purpose-built for mining, construction & transport
What We Build

Products

Category 01

Boots & Protective Apparel

  • Construction boots with reinforced stitching and puncture-proof soles
  • High-grade leather, steel-toe construction for site safety
  • Available now in men's, women's, and standard safety ranges

Category 02

Heavy-Duty Industrial Tyres

  • Reinforced, puncture-resistant compounds for extreme terrain
  • Aggressive tread patterns for maximum traction in mud, rock, and loose earth
  • Built for heavy load-bearing capacities under grueling cycles

Category 03

Heavy Machinery & Earth-Moving Equipment

  • Advanced mining equipment engineered for high-stress, high-wear conditions
  • Unrivaled mechanical reliability that minimizes downtime

Category 01 · Premium Protective Equipment

Magnoryx Heavy-Duty Steel-Toe Construction Boots

Featuring high-grade leather construction, reinforced stitching, and puncture-proof, heavy-duty soles engineered specifically for site safety, stability, and extreme longevity.

Steel-toe Chelsea boot with reinforced rubber sole and embroidered antelope emblem.

Regular Safety Boot

Magnoryx Sentry

×

Magnoryx Apex — Black (Men's Top of Range)

The Magnoryx Apex Black combines a steel-toe cap, oil-resistant outsole and the signature Magnoryx antelope crest, embroidered onto full-grain leather built for long shifts on demanding sites.

×

Magnoryx Apex — Brown (Women's Top of Range)

Finished in rich tan leather with a gum rubber outsole, the Apex Brown delivers full steel-toe protection with a streamlined silhouette — the flagship boot in the women's range.

×

Magnoryx Sentry — Regular Safety Boot

The everyday Magnoryx Sentry offers full lace-up ankle support, a reinforced steel toe cap, and a durable rubber outsole for everyday site safety — our standard-issue safety boot.

Why Magnoryx

The Magnoryx Promise

Every piece of equipment, tyre, and stitch of apparel bearing the Magnoryx name undergoes rigorous testing to ensure it withstands the harshest industrial forces.

Durability First

We prioritize rugged materials that outlast standard commercial alternatives.

Precision Engineering

Fusing instinctive design with structural integrity for seamless performance.

Built for Professionals

Tailored specifically for the mining, construction, and heavy transport sectors.

Get In Touch

Contact Magnoryx

Partner with Magnoryx today to bring unparalleled durability and precision engineering to your fleet and workforce operations. We welcome enquiries from distributors, procurement teams, and investors looking to grow with an emerging industrial brand.
